lms_data.question: English is a really fun subject! Reading stories is like going on [{}] adventures in your head. It's [{}] to discover different cultures through books and stories.
Some English lessons are [{}] too, like when you act out plays or tell jokes. Many kids [{}] English because it helps you talk to people from all over the world.
Hi! Nice to see you. Ready to talk about school with me? 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: Yes, ready! I like my school. It is interesting and sometimes funny.

lms_data.question: Hi, I’m Alex. I like talking about school and learning with students 😄
lms_data.expectedTranscript: What is your favorite subject at school?

lms_data.question: Yes, that's right. What do you like about school? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I like my classes, especially history and art.

lms_data.question: Oh, you have a vision. That sounds interesting 😊 What is your vision about school?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: My vision is to make school more fun and creative for all students.

result.userTranscript: I don't know, I have a vision.

lms_data.question: I see — having a vision is interesting 😊 Can you describe one thing from your vision?
lms_data.expectedTranscript: I see a big classroom with windows and students reading quietly.

lms_data.question: Big—nice word. Is the school in your vision modern or old? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: The school is modern, with big windows and bright classrooms.

lms_data.question: Modern school—good. What rooms are in this modern school? 😊
lms_data.expectedTranscript: There is a big library and a science lab.

result.userTranscript: It's a library a lot of classroom.
